understanding.goal_understanding: Win each level by positioning all selectable pieces onto distinct goal tiles marked '+' simultaneously, with every goal occupied for the engine to detect WIN and progress through all levels of the KA59 puzzle game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Grid-based puzzle with obstacles/walls blocking movement. Selectable pieces are moved via actions: CLICK [x,y] relocates the selected piece directly to the target position if path/clear (e.g., from [21,21] to [9,21]), but fails if blocked (no position change). Directional actions like MOVE_RIGHT shift the piece one cell right if possible (e.g., [9,21] to [12,21]). Each action consumes one step from a finite per-level budget; invalid/blocked actions still deduct steps without movement. Multiple pieces may exist but actions affect the currently selected one; level ends on step depletion.

history.summary: Turn 32: CLICK
Level 1 step budget exhausted.
Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: Win each level by positioning all selectable pieces onto distinct goal tiles marked '+' simultaneously, with every goal occupied for the engine to detect WIN and progress through all levels of the KA59 puzzle game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Grid-based puzzle with obstacles/walls blocking movement. Selectable pieces are moved via actions: CLICK [x,y] relocates the selected piece directly to the target position if path/clear (e.g., from [21,21] to [9,21]), but fails if blocked (no position change). Directional actions like MOVE_RIGHT shift the piece one cell right if possible (e.g., [9,21] to [12,21]). Each action consumes one step from a finite per-level budget; invalid/blocked actions still deduct steps without movement. Multiple pieces may exist but actions affect the currently selected one; level ends on step depletion.
